entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of global dietary requirements but with low micronutrient concentrations

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of global dietary requirements but with low micronutrient concentrations

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A major cereal crop providing a significant portion of global dietary requirements but with low micronutrient concentrations

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT CONCENTRATIONS
entities.description: The levels of essential micronutrients present in crops

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A state of deficiency in essential micronutrients in human populations

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region identified as a hot spot for high prevalence of micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: SOUTH ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: A region identified as a hot spot for high prevalence of micronutrient malnutrition

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country with high population risk for calcium, iron, and zinc deficiencies

entities.name: CALCIUM DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency where the body lacks sufficient calcium

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency where the body lacks sufficient iron

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency where the body lacks sufficient zinc

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of undernutrition characterized by a lack of essential vitamins and minerals

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The practice of including a variety of nutrient-rich minor and neglected food crops in existing cropping systems

entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Ancient grains capable of providing reasonable yields in harsh environmental conditions and fragile ecosystems

entities.name: PSEUDOCEREALS
entities.description: Non-grass seeds used as cereals, capable of providing reasonable yields in harsh environmental conditions and fragile ecosystems

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL STRESSES
entities.description: Adverse environmental factors that affect crop growth and productivity

entities.name: FRAGILE ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Ecologically sensitive environments that are easily disturbed

entities.name: LOW-INPUT MARGINAL AGRICULTURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems characterized by minimal external inputs and poor soil quality

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall where marginal agricultural systems are prevalent

entities.name: ECONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that have economic value, the genetic control of which remains unknown for millets and pseudocereals

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area
